=====================================================\n         Slide 2: Interactive Poll\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"poll\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 这是第一个互动环节！让观众举手或喊出选项。可以说'选A的举手？选B的呢？' 营造参与感。点击对应选项显示'投票结果'，最后点揭晓按钮。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2 style=\"font-size: clamp(22px, 3vw, 36px); margin-bottom: 32px; line-height:1.4;\">\n          训练一个 ChatGPT 级别的模型<br>\n          背后需要多少条<span class=\"highlight-orange\">人工标注</span>数据？\n        </h2>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2x2\" id=\"pollOptions\">\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"a\" onclick=\"selectPoll('a')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">A</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 1,000 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"一个实习生一周搞定\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"b\" onclick=\"selectPoll('b')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">B</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 10,000 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"一个小团队忙几周\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"c\" onclick=\"selectPoll('c')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">C</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 100,000 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"要一个专业标注团队\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"poll-option\" data-option=\"d\" onclick=\"selectPoll('d')\">\n            <div class=\"option-row\">\n              <span class=\"letter\">D</span>\n              <div class=\"option-text\">\n                <span class=\"option-main\">~ 1,000,000+ 条</span>\n                <span class=\"option-desc\">\"产业级标注流水线\"</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Simulated results bar chart -->\n        <div class=\"result-section\" id=\"pollResults\">\n          <div class=\"spacer-sm\"></div>\n          <div style=\"max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">A</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-a\" data-width=\"5\">5%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">B</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-b\" data-width=\"15\">15%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">C</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-c\" data-width=\"35\">35%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"result-bar-group\">\n              <span class=\"result-label\">D</span>\n              <div class=\"result-bar-track\">\n                <div class=\"result-bar-fill bar-d\" data-width=\"45\">45%</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n          <button class=\"action-btn\" onclick=\"revealAnswer()\">揭晓答案</button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 3: The Reveal\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"reveal\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 给出震撼数据。强调数据量级，然后引出成本问题。'InstructGPT 仅仅是一个起点，后续的 GPT-4 需要的数据量更是指数级增长。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">答案揭晓</div>\n        <h2>远超你的想象</h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2 stagger\" style=\"max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;\">\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-center\">\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 8px;\">InstructGPT (2022)</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 48px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--accent-orange);\">77K+</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">人类偏好比较数据</p>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-center\">\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 8px;\">GPT-4 / Claude 级别 (估算)</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 48px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--accent-cyan);\">10M+</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">多轮标注 + 偏好数据</p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div class=\"fragment\">\n          <div class=\"callout\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n            <div class=\"callout-label\">关键事实</div>\n            <p>一条高质量 RLHF 偏好标注需要领域专家花费 <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">15-30 分钟</strong>。<br>\n            按最保守估算，InstructGPT 的标注成本就超过 <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">数百万美元</strong>。</p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 4: The Bottleneck\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"bottleneck\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 三个痛点逐一展开。每讲一个稍作停顿，让观众消化。'成本只是第一个问题...' '更致命的是第二个问题...' '还有一个被忽视的问题...'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2>人工标注：三座<span class=\"highlight-orange\">大山</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"margin-bottom: 36px;\">为什么靠人类标注无法持续扩展</p>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-3 stagger\">\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><text x=\"24\" y=\"30\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"22\" font-weight=\"bold\">$</text></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">成本爆炸</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">每条标注 $1 - $50<br>规模化后是天文数字<br>GPT-4 级别标注成本<br>可能超过 <strong>数千万美元</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">01</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><text x=\"24\" y=\"30\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"bold\">?</text></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">人才稀缺</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">数学推理要数学博士<br>代码标注要资深工程师<br>医学数据要执业医师<br><strong>去哪找 10 万个博士？</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">02</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"pillar-card\">\n            <span class=\"pillar-icon\">\n              <svg width=\"48\" height=\"48\" viewBox=\"0 0 48 48\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"24\" cy=\"24\" r=\"20\" stroke=\"#ef4444\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.3\"/><text x=\"24\" y=\"30\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#ef4444\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"bold\">!</text></svg>\n            </span>\n            <div class=\"pillar-title\">质量瓶颈</div>\n            <p class=\"pillar-desc\">标注者之间一致性低<br>疲劳导致质量下降<br>主观偏好难以统一<br><strong>噪声累积、上限受限</strong></p>\n            <span class=\"pillar-number\">03</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 5: The Pivot\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"pivot\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 这张是转折点，从问题过渡到解决方案。先让'如果...'停留一下（用 fragment），制造期待感。语气从沉重转向兴奋。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <p style=\"font-size: 22px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 32px;\">\n          人工标注不可持续，那怎么办？\n        </p>\n        <h1 class=\"fragment\">\n          如果<span class=\"gradient-text\">模型能自己来</span>呢？\n        </h1>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <p class=\"subtitle fragment\">\n          自己出题 &middot; 自己做题 &middot; 自己批改 &middot; 自己改进\n        </p>\n        <div class=\"spacer-lg\"></div>\n        <div class=\"fragment\" style=\"opacity: 0;\">\n          <p style=\"font-size: 20px; color: var(--text-muted);\">\n            \"这听起来像自己拽着头发把自己从沼泽里拉出来？\"\n          </p>\n          <p style=\"font-size: 16px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px;\">\n            —— 没错，这正是 <span class=\"highlight-orange\">Bootstrap（自举）</span>的精髓\n          </p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 6: Bootstrap Concept\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"bootstrap\"\n         data-notes=\"90s - 讲 Munchausen 的故事（简短有趣），然后过渡到技术直觉。关键强调：虽然听起来矛盾，但在正确的条件下确实 work。'模型的输出虽然不完美，但其中隐含着有价值的信号。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"tag\">Core Idea</div>\n        <h2>自举（Bootstrap）：<span class=\"highlight-orange\">用自己提升自己</span></h2>\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n\n        <div class=\"grid-2\" style=\"max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; align-items: center;\">\n          <!-- Left: Story -->\n          <div class=\"glass-card text-left\">\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; margin-bottom: 12px;\">Baron Munchausen 的故事</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 15px; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.7;\">\n              这位男爵掉进了沼泽，他的解决方案是——\n              <strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">拽着自己的头发把自己拉了出来</strong>。\n            </p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.7;\">\n              这当然是吹牛。但在 AI 领域，\n              \"用自己的输出训练自己\"这件事，\n              在特定条件下<strong style=\"color: var(--text-primary);\">真的可行</strong>。\n            </p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Right: Cycle diagram -->\n          <div style=\"text-align: center;\">\n            <svg viewBox=\"0 0 300 300\" width=\"260\" height=\"260\">\n              <!-- Circular arrows -->\n              <defs>\n                <marker id=\"arrowhead\" markerWidth=\"8\" markerHeight=\"6\" refX=\"8\" refY=\"3\" orient=\"auto\">\n                  <polygon points=\"0 0, 8 3, 0 6\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n                </marker>\n                <linearGradient id=\"circGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"100%\">\n                  <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n                  <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n                </linearGradient>\n              </defs>\n\n              <!-- Center circle -->\n              <circle cx=\"150\" cy=\"150\" r=\"40\" fill=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.1)\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n              <text x=\"150\" y=\"145\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"13\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">LLM</text>\n              <text x=\"150\" y=\"162\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"10\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Model</text>\n\n              <!-- Top node: Generate -->\n              <rect x=\"105\" y=\"15\" width=\"90\" height=\"36\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n              <text x=\"150\" y=\"38\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Generate</text>\n\n              <!-- Right node: Evaluate -->\n              <rect x=\"215\" y=\"182\" width=\"80\" height=\"36\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n              <text x=\"255\" y=\"205\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Evaluate</text>\n\n              <!-- Left node: Train -->\n              <rect x=\"5\" y=\"182\" width=\"80\" height=\"36\" rx=\"8\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.15)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n              <text x=\"45\" y=\"205\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Train</text>\n\n              <!-- Arrows: circular flow -->\n              <!-- Top to Right -->\n              <path d=\"M 190 50 Q 240 90 240 180\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"url(#circGrad)\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowhead)\">\n                <animate attributeName=\"stroke-dasharray\" from=\"0,200\" to=\"200,0\" dur=\"1.5s\" fill=\"freeze\"/>\n              </path>\n              <!-- Right to Left -->\n              <path d=\"M 215 210 Q 150 260 85 210\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"url(#circGrad)\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowhead)\">\n                <animate attributeName=\"stroke-dasharray\" from=\"0,200\" to=\"200,0\" dur=\"1.5s\" begin=\"0.5s\" fill=\"freeze\"/>\n              </path>\n              <!-- Left to Top -->\n              <path d=\"M 60 182 Q 60 90 110 50\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"url(#circGrad)\" stroke-width=\"2\" marker-end=\"url(#arrowhead)\">\n                <animate attributeName=\"stroke-dasharray\" from=\"0,200\" to=\"200,0\" dur=\"1.5s\" begin=\"1s\" fill=\"freeze\"/>\n              </path>\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-md\"></div>\n        <div class=\"callout fragment\" style=\"max-width: 800px;\">\n          <div class=\"callout-label\">Key Insight</div>\n          <p>模型的输出虽然不完美，但其中<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-orange);\">隐含着有价值的信号</strong>。\n          只要我们有办法<strong style=\"color: var(--accent-cyan);\">识别和筛选</strong>这些信号，就能用它们来提升模型自身。</p>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 7: Student Analogy (3 Stages)\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"analogy\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 用学生学习的类比把三个阶段讲清楚。重点强调第三阶段（高亮卡片）。'Pre-training 就像读了所有维基百科——你知道了很多，但你不知道怎么跟人说话。SFT/RLHF 就像有老师手把手教你。而 Self-Improving 就是——你自己给自己布置作业、做完了自己批改。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2>LLM 的<span class=\"gradient-text\">成长三阶段</span></h2>\n        <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"margin-bottom: 40px;\">从跟老师学到自己学</p>\n\n        <div style=\"display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr auto 1fr; gap: 16px; align-items: center; max-width: 960px; margin: 0 auto;\" class=\"stagger\">\n          <!-- Stage 1 -->\n          <div class=\"stage-card\">\n            <div class=\"stage-number\">1</div>\n            <div class=\"stage-emoji\">\n              <svg width=\"52\" height=\"52\" viewBox=\"0 0 52 52\"><rect x=\"8\" y=\"6\" width=\"36\" height=\"40\" rx=\"4\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#94a3b8\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"16\" x2=\"36\" y2=\"16\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"24\" x2=\"32\" y2=\"24\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"32\" x2=\"28\" y2=\"32\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/></svg>\n            </div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px;\">Pre-training</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">读遍所有教科书</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px;\">\"知道很多，但不会说人话\"</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Arrow -->\n          <div class=\"stage-arrow\">\n            <svg width=\"32\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 32 24\"><path d=\"M 0 12 L 24 12 M 18 6 L 24 12 L 18 18\" stroke=\"#64748b\" stroke-width=\"2\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/></svg>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Stage 2 -->\n          <div class=\"stage-card\">\n            <div class=\"stage-number\">2</div>\n            <div class=\"stage-emoji\">\n              <svg width=\"52\" height=\"52\" viewBox=\"0 0 52 52\"><circle cx=\"26\" cy=\"18\" r=\"10\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#94a3b8\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 14 46 C 14 34 38 34 38 46\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#94a3b8\" stroke-width=\"2\"/><path d=\"M 34 12 L 40 6\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/><circle cx=\"42\" cy=\"4\" r=\"2\" fill=\"#06b6d4\"/></svg>\n            </div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px;\">SFT / RLHF</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">老师手把手批改作业</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px;\">\"学会了，但老师很贵\"</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Arrow -->\n          <div class=\"stage-arrow\">\n            <svg width=\"32\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 32 24\"><path d=\"M 0 12 L 24 12 M 18 6 L 24 12 L 18 18\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" fill=\"none\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"/></svg>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Stage 3 (highlighted) -->\n          <div class=\"stage-card stage-highlight\">\n            <div class=\"stage-number\">3</div>\n            <div class=\"stage-emoji\">\n              <svg width=\"52\" height=\"52\" viewBox=\"0 0 52 52\">\n                <circle cx=\"26\" cy=\"22\" r=\"14\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\"/>\n                <path d=\"M 20 22 C 20 16 32 16 32 22 C 32 28 20 28 20 22\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n                <circle cx=\"26\" cy=\"22\" r=\"4\" fill=\"#f97316\" opacity=\"0.6\"/>\n                <path d=\"M 26 8 L 26 4 M 40 22 L 44 22 M 12 22 L 8 22 M 36 12 L 39 9 M 16 12 L 13 9\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"1.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" opacity=\"0.4\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </div>\n            <h3 style=\"font-size: 18px; color: var(--accent-orange);\">Self-Improving</h3>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;\">自己出题、做题、批改</p>\n            <p style=\"font-size: 12px; color: var(--accent-orange); margin-top: 8px; font-weight: 500;\">\"今天的主角\"</p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 8: Panorama Map\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"panorama\"\n         data-notes=\"120s - 这是最关键的一张 slide，全场都会回来引用。逐一介绍三大分支，每个分支简要提一下包含哪些方法。不需要展开细讲，只要让观众'知道有这些东西'就好。'接下来三位同学会分别深入讲解这三大方向。'\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <div class=\"panorama-wrapper\">\n          <div class=\"panorama-header\">\n            <h2><span class=\"gradient-text\">全景地图</span>：方法分类框架</h2>\n            <p class=\"subtitle\" style=\"font-size: 17px; margin-bottom: 8px;\">Self-Improving &amp; Self-Evolving Algorithms</p>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Connector line -->\n          <div class=\"panorama-connector fragment\">\n            <div class=\"connector-line\"><span class=\"mid-dot\"></span></div>\n          </div>\n\n          <!-- Three branches -->\n          <div class=\"panorama-branches\">\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-orange fragment\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title highlight-orange\">自我提升</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">Self-Improving</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Self-Instruct <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自己出题</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> STaR <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自举推理</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Self-Refine <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自我改进</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> ReST <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">强化自训练</span></li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-cyan fragment\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title highlight-cyan\">自我博弈</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">Self-Play</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> SPIN <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自我博弈微调</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Self-Rewarding <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">自我奖励</span></li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"panorama-branch branch-green fragment\">\n              <div class=\"branch-title highlight-green\">自我进化</div>\n              <div class=\"branch-subtitle\">Self-Evolving</div>\n              <ul class=\"branch-methods\">\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> Constitutional AI <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">宪法 AI</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> FunSearch <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">进化搜索</span></li>\n                <li><span class=\"method-dot\"></span> EvoPrompt <span style=\"color:var(--text-muted); font-size:12px; margin-left:auto;\">进化提示</span></li>\n              </ul>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- =====================================================\n         Slide 9: Transition & Key Questions\n         ===================================================== -->\n    <div class=\"slide\" id=\"transition\"\n         data-notes=\"60s - 收束全场，留下悬念。把三个问题念出来，语气从好奇到坚定。最后一句交棒：'带着这些疑问，接下来 XX 同学会带我们深入了解具体的方法。' 笑着走回座位。\">\n      <div class=\"slide-content\">\n        <h2 style=\"margin-bottom: 36px;\">\n          带着这些问题<br>进入<span class=\"gradient-text\">具体方法</span>\n        </h2>\n\n        <div class=\"question-list stagger\">\n          <div class=\"question-item\">\n            <span class=\"q-number\">1</span>\n            <span class=\"q-text\">一个模型真的能通过<strong class=\"highlight-orange\">自己训练自己</strong>变得更强吗？</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"question-item\">\n            <span class=\"q-number\">2</span>\n            <span class=\"q-text\">这难道不就是\"<strong class=\"highlight-cyan\">自己批改自己的作业</strong>\"吗？</span>\n          </div>\n          <div class=\"question-item\">\n            <span class=\"q-number\">3</span>\n            <span class=\"q-text\">自我提升有<strong class=\"highlight-green\">天花板</strong>吗？</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"spacer-lg\"></div>\n        <p class=\"fragment\" style=\"font-size: 22px; color: var(--text-secondary);\">\n          接下来，让我们深入了解具体的方法 &rarr;\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n  </div><!-- end .presentation -->\n\n  <!-- =====================================================\n       Navigation UI\n       ===================================================== -->\n  <div class=\"progress-track\">\n    <div class=\"progress-fill\" id=\"progressFill\"></div>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"nav-bar\">\n    <span class=\"nav-hint\"><kbd>&larr;</kbd> <kbd>&rarr;</kbd> navigate &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; <kbd>S</kbd> notes &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; <kbd>F</kbd> fullscreen</span>\n    <span class=\"slide-counter\" id=\"slideCounter\">1 / 10</span>\n  </div>\n\n  <!-- Speaker Notes Overlay -->\n  <div class=\"speaker-notes\" id=\"speakerNotes\"></div>\n\n  <!-- =====================================================\n       JavaScript\n       ===================================================== -->\n  <script>\n    (function() {\n      'use strict';\n\n      // ========== Slide Navigation ==========\n      const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');\n      const totalSlides = slides.length;\n      let currentSlide = 0;\n      let isAnimating = false;\n      let notesVisible = false;\n\n      function getFragments(slideEl) {\n        return Array.from(slideEl.querySelectorAll('.fragment:not(.visible)'));\n      }\n\n      function getAllFragments(slideEl) {\n        return Array.from(slideEl.querySelectorAll('.fragment'));\n      }\n\n      function updateUI() {\n        document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width =\n          ((currentSlide + 1) / totalSlides * 100) + '%';\n        document.getElementById('slideCounter').textContent =\n          (currentSlide + 1) + ' / ' + totalSlides;\n\n        // Update speaker notes\n        const notes = slides[currentSlide].getAttribute('data-notes') || '';\n        const notesEl = document.getElementById('speakerNotes');\n        notesEl.innerHTML = notes;\n      }\n\n      function goToSlide(index) {\n        if (index < 0 || index >= totalSlides || index === currentSlide || isAnimating) return;\n        isAnimating = true;\n\n        const direction = index > currentSlide ? 1 : -1;\n        const prevSlide = slides[currentSlide];\n        const nextSlide = slides[index];\n\n        // Reset fragments on next slide\n        getAllFragments(nextSlide).forEach(f => f.classList.remove('visible'));\n\n        prevSlide.classList.remove('active');\n        prevSlide.classList.add(direction > 0 ? 'exit-left' : '');\n        prevSlide.style.transform = direction > 0\n          ? 'translateX(-40px) scale(0.98)'\n          : 'translateX(40px) scale(0.98)';\n\n        nextSlide.style.transform = direction > 0\n          ? 'translateX(40px) scale(0.98)'\n          : 'translateX(-40px) scale(0.98)';\n        nextSlide.classList.add('active');\n\n        requestAnimationFrame(() => {\n          nextSlide.style.transform = '';\n        });\n\n        currentSlide = index;\n        updateUI();\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          prevSlide.classList.remove('exit-left');\n          prevSlide.style.transform = '';\n          isAnimating = false;\n        }, 500);\n      }\n\n      function nextStep() {\n        const hiddenFragments = getFragments(slides[currentSlide]);\n        if (hiddenFragments.length > 0) {\n          hiddenFragments[0].classList.add('visible');\n        } else {\n          goToSlide(currentSlide + 1);\n        }\n      }\n\n      function prevStep() {\n        const visibleFragments = getAllFragments(slides[currentSlide])\n          .filter(f => f.classList.contains('visible'));\n        if (visibleFragments.length > 0) {\n          visibleFragments[visibleFragments.length - 1].classList.remove('visible');\n        } else {\n          goToSlide(currentSlide - 1);\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Keyboard controls\n      document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {\n        switch(e.key) {\n          case 'ArrowRight':\n          case ' ':\n          case 'PageDown':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            nextStep();\n            break;\n          case 'ArrowLeft':\n          case 'PageUp':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            prevStep();\n            break;\n          case 'Home':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            goToSlide(0);\n            break;\n          case 'End':\n            e.preventDefault();\n            goToSlide(totalSlides - 1);\n            break;\n          case 's':\n          case 'S':\n            notesVisible = !notesVisible;\n            document.getElementById('speakerNotes').classList.toggle('show', notesVisible);\n            break;\n          case 'f':\n          case 'F':\n            if (!document.fullscreenElement) {\n              document.documentElement.requestFullscreen().catch(() => {});\n            } else {\n              document.exitFullscreen().catch(() => {});\n            }\n            break;\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Click navigation (left 30% goes back, right 70% goes forward)\n      document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\n        // Don't interfere with interactive elements\n        if (e.target.closest('.poll-option, .action-btn, button, a, input')) return;\n        if (e.clientX < window.innerWidth * 0.3) {\n          prevStep();\n        } else {\n          nextStep();\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Touch support\n      let touchStartX = 0;\n      document.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {\n        touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      document.addEventListener('touchend', function(e) {\n        const diff = touchStartX - e.changedTouches[0].screenX;\n        if (Math.abs(diff) > 50) {\n          if (diff > 0) nextStep();\n          else prevStep();\n        }\n      }, { passive: true });\n\n      // ========== Poll Interaction ==========\n      let pollAnswered = false;\n\n      window.selectPoll = function(option) {\n        if (pollAnswered) return;\n        pollAnswered = true;\n\n        document.querySelectorAll('.poll-option').forEach(el => {\n          el.classList.remove('selected');\n          el.style.pointerEvents = 'none';\n        });\n        document.querySelector(`.poll-option[data-option=\"${option}\"]`).classList.add('selected');\n\n        // Show result bars\n        const resultSection = document.getElementById('pollResults');\n        resultSection.classList.add('show');\n\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          document.querySelectorAll('.result-bar-fill').forEach(bar => {\n            bar.style.width = bar.getAttribute('data-width') + '%';\n          });\n        }, 100);\n      };\n\n      window.revealAnswer = function() {\n        // Highlight option D as correct\n        document.querySelectorAll('.poll-option').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('selected'));\n        document.querySelector('.poll-option[data-option=\"d\"]').classList.add('correct');\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').textContent = 'D 是最接近的答案';\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').style.background =\n          'linear-gradient(135deg, #22c55e, #16a34a)';\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').style.boxShadow =\n          '0 4px 16px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3)';\n        document.querySelector('.action-btn').style.pointerEvents = 'none';\n      };\n\n      // ========== Init ==========\n      updateUI();\n    })();\n  </script>\n</body>\n</html>\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"48698242-9611-4d74-9b56-fa15ff687519","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}

{"parentUuid":"df2ee95d-f481-41b6-8294-0d985c66d703","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"012b0117-a762-4327-8473-6968102bf3f9","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01GXbSXqM3fQhK8qmY2PUFL2","type":"tool_result","content":"Updated task #2 status"}]},"uuid":"5f6b3e55-1894-47d0-b867-cf493272dac5","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:16:36.651Z","toolUseResult":{"success":true,"taskId":"2","updatedFields":["status"],"statusChange":{"from":"in_progress","to":"completed"},"verificationNudgeNeeded":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"df2ee95d-f481-41b6-8294-0d985c66d703","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}
{"parentUuid":"5f6b3e55-1894-47d0-b867-cf493272dac5","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_bdrk_01XCPLoZPpithrat1nz6JETy","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now let me create the standalone panorama map SVG for team reuse."}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":88,"cache_read_input_tokens":73923,"output_tokens":89,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":88},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"83908826-46e3-491e-8991-b54d02116beb","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:16:41.520Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}
{"parentUuid":"83908826-46e3-491e-8991-b54d02116beb","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_bdrk_01XCPLoZPpithrat1nz6JETy","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_bdrk_01QTefGtCWXvEPihgAX5Buyv","name":"TaskUpdate","input":{"status":"in_progress","taskId":"3"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":88,"cache_read_input_tokens":73923,"output_tokens":89,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":88},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"574c670e-26e5-4fbd-9be1-9505f858c678","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:16:41.810Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}
{"parentUuid":"574c670e-26e5-4fbd-9be1-9505f858c678","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"012b0117-a762-4327-8473-6968102bf3f9","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01QTefGtCWXvEPihgAX5Buyv","type":"tool_result","content":"Updated task #3 status"}]},"uuid":"4637a113-1268-4617-88d2-ad9967b65fd8","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:16:41.844Z","toolUseResult":{"success":true,"taskId":"3","updatedFields":["status"],"statusChange":{"from":"pending","to":"in_progress"},"verificationNudgeNeeded":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"574c670e-26e5-4fbd-9be1-9505f858c678","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}
{"parentUuid":"4637a113-1268-4617-88d2-ad9967b65fd8","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_bdrk_0134rXUisao3H3Z42njM9P8s","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_bdrk_01Pb5psjzwdAYectbU4iLtAY","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm/assets/panorama_map.svg","content":"<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n<!--\n  全景分类图 - 自我提升与自我进化算法\n  供全组 PPT 复用，可在浏览器中直接打开查看\n  使用方法：在你负责的 Part 中高亮对应分支，其余分支降低透明度\n-->\n<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 1000 620\" width=\"1000\" height=\"620\">\n  <defs>\n    <linearGradient id=\"bgGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"100%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#0a0f1e\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#0d1525\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"orangeGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#fbbf24\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"cyanGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#38bdf8\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"greenGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#22c55e\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#4ade80\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"connectorGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"50%\" stop-color=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <filter id=\"glow\">\n      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation=\"3\" result=\"blur\"/>\n      <feMerge><feMergeNode in=\"blur\"/><feMergeNode in=\"SourceGraphic\"/></feMerge>\n    </filter>\n  </defs>\n\n  <!-- Background -->\n  <rect width=\"1000\" height=\"620\" fill=\"url(#bgGrad)\" rx=\"12\"/>\n\n  <!-- Grid pattern -->\n  <g opacity=\"0.04\">\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"60\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"120\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"120\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"180\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"240\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"240\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"300\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"300\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"360\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"360\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"420\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"420\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"480\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"480\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"540\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"540\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"200\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"200\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"400\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"400\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"600\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"600\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"800\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"800\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- Title -->\n  <text x=\"500\" y=\"48\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"26\" font-weight=\"700\"\n        font-family=\"Inter, -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif\">\n    Self-Improving &amp; Self-Evolving Algorithms\n  </text>\n  <text x=\"500\" y=\"75\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"15\"\n        font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">\n    自我提升与自我进化算法 · 全景分类框架\n  </text>\n\n  <!-- Connector line -->\n  <line x1=\"120\" y1=\"110\" x2=\"880\" y2=\"110\" stroke=\"url(#connectorGrad)\" stroke-width=\"3\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>\n  <circle cx=\"200\" cy=\"110\" r=\"6\" fill=\"#f97316\" filter=\"url(#glow)\"/>\n  <circle cx=\"500\" cy=\"110\" r=\"6\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" filter=\"url(#glow)\"/>\n  <circle cx=\"800\" cy=\"110\" r=\"6\" fill=\"#22c55e\" filter=\"url(#glow)\"/>\n\n  <!-- Vertical lines from dots to branches -->\n  <line x1=\"200\" y1=\"116\" x2=\"200\" y2=\"150\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n  <line x1=\"500\" y1=\"116\" x2=\"500\" y2=\"150\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n  <line x1=\"800\" y1=\"116\" x2=\"800\" y2=\"150\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n\n  <!-- ===== Branch 1: Self-Improving (Orange) ===== -->\n  <g id=\"branch-improving\">\n    <!-- Branch box -->\n    <rect x=\"60\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"440\" rx=\"14\" fill=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.04)\" stroke=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.2)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>\n    <!-- Top accent bar -->\n    <rect x=\"60\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"4\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"url(#orangeGrad)\"/>\n    <!-- Branch title -->\n    <text x=\"200\" y=\"190\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"700\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我提升</text>\n    <text x=\"200\" y=\"212\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"13\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Improving</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Self-Instruct -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"235\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"263\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"256\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Instruct</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"274\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自己给自己出题</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: STaR -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"303\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"331\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"324\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">STaR</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"342\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自举推理 · Bootstrapping Reasoning</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Self-Refine -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"371\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"399\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"392\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Refine</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"410\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">迭代自我改进 · Generate→Critique→Refine</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: ReST -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"439\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"467\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"460\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">ReST</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"478\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">强化自训练 · Reinforced Self-Training</text>\n\n    <!-- Speaker label -->\n    <rect x=\"140\" y=\"520\" width=\"120\" height=\"30\" rx=\"15\" fill=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.15)\" stroke=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <text x=\"200\" y=\"540\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">Part 2 · 成员 B</text>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- ===== Branch 2: Self-Play (Cyan) ===== -->\n  <g id=\"branch-play\">\n    <rect x=\"360\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"440\" rx=\"14\" fill=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.04)\" stroke=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.2)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>\n    <rect x=\"360\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"4\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"url(#cyanGrad)\"/>\n    <text x=\"500\" y=\"190\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"700\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我博弈</text>\n    <text x=\"500\" y=\"212\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"13\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Play</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: SPIN -->\n    <rect x=\"382\" y=\"235\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"400\" cy=\"263\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"256\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">SPIN</text>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"274\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我博弈微调 · 类比 AlphaGo</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Self-Rewarding LM -->\n    <rect x=\"382\" y=\"303\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"400\" cy=\"331\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"324\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Rewarding LM</text>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"342\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我奖励 · 既当选手又当裁判</text>\n\n    <!-- Speaker label -->\n    <rect x=\"440\" y=\"520\" width=\"120\" height=\"30\" rx=\"15\" fill=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.15)\" stroke=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <text x=\"500\" y=\"540\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">Part 3 · 成员 C</text>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- ===== Branch 3: Self-Evolving (Green) ===== -->\n  <g id=\"branch-evolving\">\n    <rect x=\"660\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"440\" rx=\"14\" fill=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.04)\" stroke=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.2)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>\n    <rect x=\"660\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"4\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"url(#greenGrad)\"/>\n    <text x=\"800\" y=\"190\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"700\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我进化</text>\n    <text x=\"800\" y=\"212\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"13\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Evolving</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Constitutional AI -->\n    <rect x=\"682\" y=\"235\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"700\" cy=\"263\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"256\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Constitutional AI</text>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"274\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">宪法 AI · 原则驱动的自我进化</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: FunSearch -->\n    <rect x=\"682\" y=\"303\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"700\" cy=\"331\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"324\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">FunSearch</text>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"342\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">LLM + 进化搜索 · DeepMind 2024</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: EvoPrompt -->\n    <rect x=\"682\" y=\"371\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"700\" cy=\"399\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"392\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">EvoPrompt</text>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"410\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">进化提示优化</text>\n\n    <!-- Speaker label -->\n    <rect x=\"740\" y=\"520\" width=\"120\" height=\"30\" rx=\"15\" fill=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.15)\" stroke=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <text x=\"800\" y=\"540\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">Part 3 · 成员 C</text>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- Footer -->\n  <text x=\"500\" y=\"600\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"11\"\n        font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">\n    CS2916 大语言模型 · 上海交通大学 · 2026 春季\n  </text>\n</svg>\n"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":107,"cache_read_input_tokens":74011,"output_tokens":4753,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":107},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"967e2290-c5d4-4cdb-a698-fba1cb00700c","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:17:31.828Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}

created successfully at: /home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm/assets/panorama_map.svg (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"c92d8bfb-e2fb-425a-aa91-b7dc60173236","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:17:51.287Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"create","filePath":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm/assets/panorama_map.svg","content":"<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n<!--\n  全景分类图 - 自我提升与自我进化算法\n  供全组 PPT 复用，可在浏览器中直接打开查看\n  使用方法：在你负责的 Part 中高亮对应分支，其余分支降低透明度\n-->\n<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 1000 620\" width=\"1000\" height=\"620\">\n  <defs>\n    <linearGradient id=\"bgGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"100%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#0a0f1e\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#0d1525\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"orangeGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#fbbf24\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"cyanGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#38bdf8\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"greenGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#22c55e\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#4ade80\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <linearGradient id=\"connectorGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"100%\" y2=\"0%\">\n      <stop offset=\"0%\" stop-color=\"#f97316\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"50%\" stop-color=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n      <stop offset=\"100%\" stop-color=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    </linearGradient>\n    <filter id=\"glow\">\n      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation=\"3\" result=\"blur\"/>\n      <feMerge><feMergeNode in=\"blur\"/><feMergeNode in=\"SourceGraphic\"/></feMerge>\n    </filter>\n  </defs>\n\n  <!-- Background -->\n  <rect width=\"1000\" height=\"620\" fill=\"url(#bgGrad)\" rx=\"12\"/>\n\n  <!-- Grid pattern -->\n  <g opacity=\"0.04\">\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"60\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"60\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"120\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"120\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"180\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"180\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"240\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"240\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"300\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"300\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"360\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"360\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"420\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"420\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"480\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"480\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"0\" y1=\"540\" x2=\"1000\" y2=\"540\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"200\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"200\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"400\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"400\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"600\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"600\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <line x1=\"800\" y1=\"0\" x2=\"800\" y2=\"620\" stroke=\"white\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- Title -->\n  <text x=\"500\" y=\"48\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"26\" font-weight=\"700\"\n        font-family=\"Inter, -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif\">\n    Self-Improving &amp; Self-Evolving Algorithms\n  </text>\n  <text x=\"500\" y=\"75\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"15\"\n        font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">\n    自我提升与自我进化算法 · 全景分类框架\n  </text>\n\n  <!-- Connector line -->\n  <line x1=\"120\" y1=\"110\" x2=\"880\" y2=\"110\" stroke=\"url(#connectorGrad)\" stroke-width=\"3\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>\n  <circle cx=\"200\" cy=\"110\" r=\"6\" fill=\"#f97316\" filter=\"url(#glow)\"/>\n  <circle cx=\"500\" cy=\"110\" r=\"6\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" filter=\"url(#glow)\"/>\n  <circle cx=\"800\" cy=\"110\" r=\"6\" fill=\"#22c55e\" filter=\"url(#glow)\"/>\n\n  <!-- Vertical lines from dots to branches -->\n  <line x1=\"200\" y1=\"116\" x2=\"200\" y2=\"150\" stroke=\"#f97316\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n  <line x1=\"500\" y1=\"116\" x2=\"500\" y2=\"150\" stroke=\"#06b6d4\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n  <line x1=\"800\" y1=\"116\" x2=\"800\" y2=\"150\" stroke=\"#22c55e\" stroke-width=\"2\" opacity=\"0.5\"/>\n\n  <!-- ===== Branch 1: Self-Improving (Orange) ===== -->\n  <g id=\"branch-improving\">\n    <!-- Branch box -->\n    <rect x=\"60\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"440\" rx=\"14\" fill=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.04)\" stroke=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.2)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>\n    <!-- Top accent bar -->\n    <rect x=\"60\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"4\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"url(#orangeGrad)\"/>\n    <!-- Branch title -->\n    <text x=\"200\" y=\"190\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"700\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我提升</text>\n    <text x=\"200\" y=\"212\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"13\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Improving</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Self-Instruct -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"235\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"263\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"256\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Instruct</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"274\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自己给自己出题</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: STaR -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"303\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"331\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"324\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">STaR</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"342\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自举推理 · Bootstrapping Reasoning</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Self-Refine -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"371\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"399\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"392\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Refine</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"410\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">迭代自我改进 · Generate→Critique→Refine</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: ReST -->\n    <rect x=\"82\" y=\"439\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"100\" cy=\"467\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#f97316\"/>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"460\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">ReST</text>\n    <text x=\"116\" y=\"478\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">强化自训练 · Reinforced Self-Training</text>\n\n    <!-- Speaker label -->\n    <rect x=\"140\" y=\"520\" width=\"120\" height=\"30\" rx=\"15\" fill=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.15)\" stroke=\"rgba(249,115,22,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <text x=\"200\" y=\"540\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#f97316\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">Part 2 · 成员 B</text>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- ===== Branch 2: Self-Play (Cyan) ===== -->\n  <g id=\"branch-play\">\n    <rect x=\"360\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"440\" rx=\"14\" fill=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.04)\" stroke=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.2)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>\n    <rect x=\"360\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"4\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"url(#cyanGrad)\"/>\n    <text x=\"500\" y=\"190\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"700\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我博弈</text>\n    <text x=\"500\" y=\"212\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"13\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Play</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: SPIN -->\n    <rect x=\"382\" y=\"235\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"400\" cy=\"263\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"256\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">SPIN</text>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"274\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我博弈微调 · 类比 AlphaGo</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Self-Rewarding LM -->\n    <rect x=\"382\" y=\"303\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"400\" cy=\"331\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#06b6d4\"/>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"324\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Rewarding LM</text>\n    <text x=\"416\" y=\"342\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我奖励 · 既当选手又当裁判</text>\n\n    <!-- Speaker label -->\n    <rect x=\"440\" y=\"520\" width=\"120\" height=\"30\" rx=\"15\" fill=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.15)\" stroke=\"rgba(6,182,212,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <text x=\"500\" y=\"540\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#06b6d4\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">Part 3 · 成员 C</text>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- ===== Branch 3: Self-Evolving (Green) ===== -->\n  <g id=\"branch-evolving\">\n    <rect x=\"660\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"440\" rx=\"14\" fill=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.04)\" stroke=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.2)\" stroke-width=\"1.5\"/>\n    <rect x=\"660\" y=\"150\" width=\"280\" height=\"4\" rx=\"2\" fill=\"url(#greenGrad)\"/>\n    <text x=\"800\" y=\"190\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"20\" font-weight=\"700\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">自我进化</text>\n    <text x=\"800\" y=\"212\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"13\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Self-Evolving</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: Constitutional AI -->\n    <rect x=\"682\" y=\"235\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"700\" cy=\"263\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"256\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">Constitutional AI</text>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"274\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">宪法 AI · 原则驱动的自我进化</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: FunSearch -->\n    <rect x=\"682\" y=\"303\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"700\" cy=\"331\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"324\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">FunSearch</text>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"342\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">LLM + 进化搜索 · DeepMind 2024</text>\n\n    <!-- Method: EvoPrompt -->\n    <rect x=\"682\" y=\"371\" width=\"236\" height=\"56\" rx=\"10\" fill=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)\" stroke=\"rgba(255,255,255,0.08)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <circle cx=\"700\" cy=\"399\" r=\"5\" fill=\"#22c55e\"/>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"392\" fill=\"#f1f5f9\" font-size=\"15\" font-weight=\"600\" font-family=\"Inter, sans-serif\">EvoPrompt</text>\n    <text x=\"716\" y=\"410\" fill=\"#94a3b8\" font-size=\"12\" font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">进化提示优化</text>\n\n    <!-- Speaker label -->\n    <rect x=\"740\" y=\"520\" width=\"120\" height=\"30\" rx=\"15\" fill=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.15)\" stroke=\"rgba(34,197,94,0.3)\" stroke-width=\"1\"/>\n    <text x=\"800\" y=\"540\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#22c55e\" font-size=\"12\" font-weight=\"600\"\n          font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">Part 3 · 成员 C</text>\n  </g>\n\n  <!-- Footer -->\n  <text x=\"500\" y=\"600\" text-anchor=\"middle\" fill=\"#64748b\" font-size=\"11\"\n        font-family=\"Inter, 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif\">\n    CS2916 大语言模型 · 上海交通大学 · 2026 春季\n  </text>\n</svg>\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"967e2290-c5d4-4cdb-a698-fba1cb00700c","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}

Let me check what's in there."}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":267,"cache_read_input_tokens":79019,"output_tokens":170,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":267},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"63a60e19-c185-4406-afc2-4fb1764093cb","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:18:07.189Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}
{"parentUuid":"63a60e19-c185-4406-afc2-4fb1764093cb","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_bdrk_01KDtaXxF9nvSAUKPrWYsi6E","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_bdrk_013thHCL78Rz5kz9PjnRJwxm","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"wc -l /home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm/slide/A.html","description":"Check size of existing A.html"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":267,"cache_read_input_tokens":79019,"output_tokens":170,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":267},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"6e6f6e8d-cc59-46a2-8f52-f21d7795865a","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:18:08.076Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}

{"parentUuid":"e28c7b4e-02f2-4825-936a-682ec74f9db9","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_bdrk_013gAjGvvpeZ6CZnWDwTym5c","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"That file is empty. The presentation is all set. Here's a summary of what was created:\n\n## 项目结构\n\n```\n.\n├── slides_part_a.html          # 主课件 (10 张 slides)\n├── assets/\n│   └── panorama_map.svg        # 全景分类图 (供全组复用)\n├── demo/                       # 演示文件夹 (Part A 无需额外 demo)\n└── plan.md                     # 总体计划\n```\n\n## slides_part_a.html 课件内容\n\n| Slide | 内容 | 时间 | 交互/亮点 |\n|-------|------|------|-----------|\n| 0 | **封面** - 标题 + 动态光晕背景 | 30s | 浮动渐变光球动画 |\n| 1 | **Hook** - \"先来一个小测试\" | 30s | Fragment 逐步显示 |\n| 2 | **互动投票** - 训练 ChatGPT 需要多少标注？ | 90s | 点击选项 → 柱状图动画 → 揭晓答案 |\n| 3 | **震撼数据** - InstructGPT 77K+ / GPT-4 10M+ | 90s | 大数字 + 关键事实卡片 |\n| 4 | **三座大山** - 成本/人才/质量 | 90s | 三列卡片交错入场 |\n| 5 | **转折** - \"如果模型能自己来呢？\" | 60s | 戏剧性 fragment 揭示 |\n| 6 | **Bootstrap** - Munchausen 故事 + 循环图 | 90s | SVG 循环箭头动画 |\n| 7 | **学生类比** - Pre-training → SFT → Self-Improving | 60s | 三阶段卡片，Stage 3 高亮 |\n| 8 | **全景地图** - 三大分支分类框架 | 120s | Fragment 逐分支展开 |\n| 9 | **过渡** - 三个关键问题 + 交棒 | 60s | 问题列表交错入场 |\n\n## 操作说明\n\n- **方向键 / 空格 / 点击右侧**：下一步（先展开 fragment，再换页）\n- **左箭头 / 点击左侧**：上一步\n- **S 键**：切换演讲者备注（每张 slide 都有时间提示和话术建议）\n- **F 键**：全屏模式\n- 支持触屏滑动\n\n直接用浏览器打开 `slides_part_a.html` 即可使用。"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":217,"cache_read_input_tokens":79286,"output_tokens":768,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":217},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"}},"type":"assistant","uuid":"4432bc95-e853-495a-8b5d-89244398e5b1","timestamp":"2026-04-21T18:18:28.107Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/home/zhuyihan/code/Self-Improving-Evolving-Algorithm","sessionId":"2ec180f5-45c4-4275-ac33-963f920665e5","version":"2.1.109","gitBranch":"main","slug":"indexed-percolating-marshmallow"}
